_comment: Single source of truth for match scoring. Consumed by backend/app/match (Python) AND frontend JS matcher (lib/match-lite). Keep both in sync via this file. Scores fuse to 0-100 with available-case normalization (absent features dropped from numerator AND denominator).
_visual_note: visual = overlap of visual attributes (colors/clothing/marks/build/hair/accessories) from Claude vision; face = cosine similarity of face embeddings. Both are absent (dropped via available-case normalization) until a photo is captured, so they never penalize text-only cases.

thresholds._comment: score >= auto_flag -> surface to operator; review_low..auto_flag -> human-review queue (Claude tie-break online); < review_low -> discard. Re-calibrate with eval.
